headline: The secret to a 20-minute full-body workout
body: Say goodbye to two-hour gym sessions. PeakForm members went from skipping workouts to training 4x a week in just 30 days. Rated 4.8 by 2,300 members.

headline: Why do most home workout plans fail?
body: 87% of people quit their plan within 6 weeks. Ours adapts to your schedule instead of fighting it. No equipment, no hidden fees, cancel anytime.
